description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a domestic cat with a slender, athletic build and a short, glossy coat. The fur is predominantly golden-brown with striking dark rosettes and spots along the body, reminiscent of a Bengal breed. The cat's head is small and angular, featuring large, upright ears and expressive, almond-shaped eyes. Its tail is long and held upright, with a dark tip and faint striping. The legs are muscular and proportionate, with distinct striping on the limbs. The overall appearance is alert and agile, suggesting a healthy, active animal.
description: A golden-brown, spotted domestic cat with a sleek build, upright tail, and alert posture. The fur pattern is reminiscent of a Bengal breed, with dark rosettes and stripes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cat's full spotted body, upright tail, and alert head turned slightly upward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cat's face, large ears, and chest, with the tail visible directly behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same spotted pattern, with the head turned upward and tail raised.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back, tail base, and hind legs, with the tail held upright and ears visible from behind.
attribute_fur_pattern: spotted tabby with golden-brown base and dark rosettes
